name: Range
entries: A Range weapon has a range in parentheses after the {@itemProperty A|XPHB|Ammunition} or {@itemProperty T|XPHB|Thrown} property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in feet, and the second is the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the long range.
